scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Prisma workspace does not expose a long-lived dev server.')"
scripts.lint: cd .. && pnpm exec prisma format --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:generate: cd .. && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: cd .. && sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma "$@"' --
scripts.db:format: cd .. && pnpm exec prisma format --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:diff: cd .. && pnpm exec prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script
